tweets.full_text:
🚨 DeepSeek V4 (GA) is reportedly in testing.

Early reports suggest:

• Opus 4.8-level performance
• Much stronger agentic behavior
• Significant coding improvements
• Major gains in 3D generation
• Direct competitor to Kimi K3 and Claude Fable
• Rumored pricing: $0.0028 https://t.co/ThddGDTfEH
tweets.summary: DeepSeek V4进入测试阶段，性能达Opus 4.8水平，定价$0.0028，与Kimi K3和Claude Fable竞争。
angles: DeepSeek V4终于来了：性能对标Opus，价格仅$0.0028
AI大模型价格战升级：DeepSeek V4挑战Claude和Kimi
代理能力突破：DeepSeek V4的3D生成和编码新高度

tweets.full_text:
A guy named Shin just open-sourced Palantir for free.

It is called OpenPlanter.

Palantir helps governments and giant companies connect scattered data about people, businesses, contracts, and money.

OpenPlanter could give that same power to ordinary people.

Feed it corporate https://t.co/jKzZOiBsoR
tweets.summary: 开发者Shin开源了Palantir平替产品OpenPlanter，让普通人也能进行数据关联分析。这是民主化企业级数据工具的重要尝试。
viral_signals: 反常识：企业级工具民主化
angles: Palantir平替来了！OpenPlanter让普通人也能做数据关联
开源工具｜从Palantir到OpenPlanter，数据分析民主化
反常识｜政府级数据工具被开源，普通人能用了

tweets.full_text:

Codex won't fix them because of Cyber guardrails
Fable won't fix them because of Cyber guardrails

Kimi K3 fixed them all. No restrictions, just gets the job done.

This will end badly for OpenAI & Anthropic.

tweets.full_text: thanks to claude pro, I made a master resume in latex, then for every application I just pasted the job description in claude code and used /applykarbsdk. It generated a tailored resume and cover letter. This workflow let me apply to 50-60 companies a day. It turned into 5

tweets.full_text:
How can an LLM switch between low-, medium-, and high-effort reasoning? And how does an LLM learn to reason more or less?

I put together a “little” article explaining how these effort levels are implemented at inference time and during training. https://t.co/mc4qiCnq0C
tweets.summary: Sebastian Rasbt深度解析LLM如何在推理时实现低、中、高难度推理切换，以及训练中学习推理强度的机制。
angles: LLM推理难度自适应：低中高三档如何切换
深度解析｜模型如何学会「偷懒」和「认真思考」
推理效率新范式：从训练到推理的思维强度控制

tweets.full_text:
my new favorite of way of using fable:

step 1. ask it to write a plan

step 2: "please get second opinions from codex CLI using gpt-5.6-sol @ max effort and kimi CLI using kimi 3. Revise your plan with any sound findings. repeat until convergence or up to 5 rounds."
tweets.summary: 用户分享了使用Fable的高级工作流：通过多个AI模型（GPT-5.6-sol、Kimi 3）进行迭代验证，直到收敛或5轮为止。
angles: 多模型协作黑科技：Fable+GPT+Kimi迭代验证法
AI规划师必学：多轮模型交叉验证工作流
Fable进阶用法：如何用多个AI模型优化方案
